hypothesis: On US500 M15, in a trending regime (ADX>22 and price above/below EMA50 slope-aligned), pullbacks to EMA20 that hold with RSI(14) crossing back through 50 resume the trend with >55% hit rate on a 1.5R target.

signals.entry_long: ema(20) > ema(50) AND ema(50)_slope_5bars > 0 AND low <= ema(20) within last 3 bars AND close > ema(20) AND rsi(14) crosses_above 50
signals.entry_short: ema(20) < ema(50) AND ema(50)_slope_5bars < 0 AND high >= ema(20) within last 3 bars AND close < ema(20) AND rsi(14) crosses_below 50
signals.exit_long: close < ema(50) OR tp_hit OR sl_hit
signals.exit_short: close > ema(50) OR tp_hit OR sl_hit

falsification: If ADX>22 regime has <300 eligible bars per year, drop to ADX>18. If win rate < 45% with 1.5R, reject — edge missing.
